description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.0.1 Docker image and defines a single stage called triage. Add a job named run:triage in the triage stage that runs only on scheduled pipelines. The job executes `gem install gitlab-triage` followed by `gitlab-triage --token $API_TOKEN --source-id 1083469 --host-url https://gitlab.com/`. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
